name: Your Daughter
detailed_description:
User Manual

Before using the product, please read this manual carefully and keep it safe.

Product Introduction

Note:
The product shown in the manual is for illustrative purposes only. Due to product updates and upgrades, the actual product may differ slightly from the image. Please refer to the actual product for confirmation.

How to Use

Shutdown

  • Right-clicking on the character's body will display the "QUIT" button, and you can use the mouse wheel to zoom in or out. Right-clicking again will hide the "QUIT" button.

  • Clicking the "QUIT" button will exit the product.

Gaze Tracking

Once the application is running, the product's gaze will follow your actions and track the movement of your mouse.

Drag

The product can be freely dragged and moved.

Notes

User Manual

Before using the product, please read this manual carefully and keep it safe.

Product Introduction

Note:
The product shown in the manual is for illustrative purposes only. Due to product updates and upgrades, the actual product may differ slightly from the image. Please refer to the actual product for confirmation.

How to Use

Shutdown

  • Right-clicking on the character's body will display the "QUIT" button, and you can use the mouse wheel to zoom in or out. Right-clicking again will hide the "QUIT" button.

  • Clicking the "QUIT" button will exit the product.

Gaze Tracking

Once the application is running, the product's gaze will follow your actions and track the movement of your mouse.

Drag

The product can be freely dragged and moved.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Danish, Ukrainian, Russian, Bulgarian, Hungarian, Indonesian, Turkish, Greek, Norwegian, Czech, Japanese, Polish, Thai, Swedish, Traditional Chinese, Romanian, Finnish, Dutch, Portuguese - Brazil, Portuguese - Portugal, Spanish - Latin America, Vietnamese, Arabic, Korean, Simplified Chinese
